title: Esters
summary: 9701 A Level esters — formation, hydrolysis, and industrial uses.
learningObjectives: Draw ester structures and name esters.
Relate esters to polyesters and biodiesel.

simpleExplanation.title: Fruit-smelling functional group
simpleExplanation.summary: Esters form from acids and alcohols. Hydrolysis reverses the link under acid or base.

sections.content: **Esters** (33.2) extend **18.2 AS**. Show **mechanism arrows** for acid-catalysed esterification where asked.
